center.name: 北马里亚纳群岛
center.summary: 北马里亚纳群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括钩嘴圆尾鹱、Mariana swiftlet、Rota white-eye等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The swiftlet is found in Guam as well as in Saipan and Aguiguan in the Northern Mariana Islands, and is locally extinct on Rota and Tinian

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Micronesia, from the Northern Mariana Islands to Palau and all the way into eastern Micronesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is critically endangered and endemic to Rota in the Northern Mariana Islands, where it mainly occurs in mature, wet limestone forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However, vagrant individuals have been identified all over South and Central America, Asia, and Oceania as seen below. Vagrants have been found in Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, El Salvador, French Southern Territories, Guatemala, Indonesia, Japan, Kiribati, Marshall Islands, Nauru, Nicaragua, Niue, Norfolk Island, Northern Mariana Islands, Palau, Panama, Papua New Guinea, Peru, Philippines, Pitcairn, Samoa, Tokelau, Tonga, Tuvalu, United States Minor Outlying Islands, and Wallis and Futuna. The Tahiti petrel requires both terrestrial and marine systems and is often found in both shallow and oceanic marine habitats as well as shrubland and forest habitat types. In terms of marine habitats, they prefer water with surface temperatures higher than 25°C. Consequently, El Niño events may have an influence on their abundance in waters of the East Pacific.{{Cite journal |last1=Ribic |first1=Christine A
